'''竏喇-ng-m-h''' ('''kahangmehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:turpentine|turpentine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:turpentine|turpentine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-ng-m-h
|-
! Lemma
| kahangmehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihangmehoko|thihangmehoko]] || [[word:jihangmehoko|jihangmehoko]] || [[word:shihangmehoko|shihangmehoko]] || [[word:kihangmehoko|kihangmehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhangmehoko|thuthuhangmehoko]] || [[word:jujuhangmehoko|jujuhangmehoko]] || [[word:shushuhangmehoko|shushuhangmehoko]] || [[word:kukuhangmehoko|kukuhangmehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
